Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 396 

PRE_ICL_MOPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Copay for one-day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP; also known as a preferred mail order pharmacy within a 
split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of
